name: splat-transform-for-lcc
description: Convert LCC/PLY Gaussian splat scenes into SuperSplat streamed LOD, SOG, and voxel outputs with bilingual guidance.

interface.displayName: Splat Transform for LCC / LCC 转 SuperSplat
interface.shortDescription: Convert LCC/PLY scenes into SuperSplat SOG, streamed LOD, voxel, and viewer routes.
interface.longDescription: Use this bilingual plugin to convert XGRIDS or 其域 LCC and original PLY Gaussian splat scenes into SuperSplat assets. It explains LCC, SuperSplat, SOG, streamed LOD, voxel collision, and version-specific coordinate defaults; prefers PLY for high-precision SOG/voxel output; uses LCC for true streamed multi-LOD output; merges v1/v2 settings JSON; and mounts scenes into a local SuperSplat viewer route.
defaultPrompt: 解释 LCC、SuperSplat、SOG、streamed LOD 和 voxel 的区别，并用默认工作流转换这个场景。
用中文说明这个 LCC/PLY 转 SuperSplat skill 的作用和价值，然后生成 SOG、streamed LOD 和 voxel 输出。
Convert this LCC scene into streamed LOD and voxel output with the default workflow.
Convert this PLY into high-precision SOG and voxel outputs for SuperSplat.
Merge these settings JSON files into a version 2 viewer settings file.
Mount this converted scene into a local SuperSplat viewer route.
